title: I updated Auth Protocols to OAuth 2.0 PKCE per Marcus's comment
titleDone: I updated Auth Protocols to OAuth 2.0 PKCE per Marcus's comment
description: Marcus commented: 'We decided to deprecate basic API key auth. Please update this section to mandate OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow with 15-minute token rotation.'
descriptionDone: Marcus commented: 'We decided to deprecate basic API key auth. Please update this section to mandate OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow with 15-minute token rotation.'
commentText: We decided to deprecate basic API key auth for the mobile client. Please update this section to mandate OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow with 15-minute token rotation.
originalContext: Marcus commented to deprecate static API key authentication headers and mandate OAuth 2.0 PKCE.
summaryOfChanges: I updated Section 4.2 to mandate OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow with 15-minute token rotation policy.
originalContentLines: • Mobile clients authenticate via static X-API-Key headers
• Token expiration is unconstrained by default
• Simple client reconnect logic without session state rotation
updatedContentLines: • Mobile clients MUST use OAuth 2.0 with Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE)
• Access tokens expire after 15 minutes via HttpOnly cookies
• Seamless refresh token rotation protocol enforced

originalContentLines: • Enterprise availability SLA target: 99.9% platform availability
